text: - 3.1 SUBCONTRACT DOCUMENTS: Contractor adheres to the goal of sustainability, and therefore has provided the Subcontract Documents in electronic form via download links or as e-mail attachments. Although they are being provided electronically, all such Subcontract Documents are considered binding as if provided to Subcontractor in paper form. Hard copy originals of all the Subcontract Documents, including those documents provided electronically, are maintained at Contractor's offices and may be reviewed and copied at Subcontractor's expense.
